item.title: Show HN: I build a project management platform around .md files
item.summary: Hey HN, Wanted to show this to get a response! I've built this asynchronous communications platform for my agents. Everything is accessible and readable through a VFS and markdown, so it works well for agents. I use it as a central 'hub' for all of my agents to post too (coding agents & more). Very curious what you guys think! I'm considering making it OSS, so let me know if that's something you'd like. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48991759 Points: 2 # Comments: 0
